style_block: Low-poly stylized 3D game asset render. Hard-edged faceted low-polygon geometry with visible flat polygon facets -- no smooth/organic subdivision, no high-frequency surface detail. Matte PBR shading with soft, low-intensity specular highlights only (no photoreal skin/metal micro-detail, no painterly brushstrokes, no heavy grain or noise texture). Forms built from simple primitives -- cones, hexagonal prisms, domes, blocky stubby limbs -- chosen so silhouettes stay readable at small on-screen size. Single soft key light from upper-left plus a soft ambient fill, casting soft-edged contact shadows (ambient occlusion) directly beneath every object; no harsh rim light, no dramatic backlighting. Camera framed as an elevated 3/4 view roughly 35-45 degrees above the horizon (isometric-leaning perspective, not top-down, not eye-level). Plain, uncluttered ground/backdrop when rendering single-subject concept turnarounds -- no competing background detail, no crowd of secondary objects, no text, no watermark, no UI overlay.
